CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-08-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On May 22, 2003
Off Calendar May-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. JoAnn Bryce.
Robert Gonzalez, Esq. for Plaintiff Sonia Avalos the Guardian ad litem and Johanna Avalos the minor claimant, both present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Attorney's fees: $18,036.00
Medical expenses in the amount of $27,053.50
Costs and expenses of $2,857.50
A net balance of $27,053.50 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank, 22nd and Mission Street Branch, San Francisco, until minor's reaches the age of 18, or with a written court order.
Order signed in open court.
CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
